style_anchor.description: dark fantasy dungeon, top-down 2D RPG, hand-painted style, detailed texture, muted palette of deep purple, burnt orange, stone grey, moss green
style_anchor.tile_suffix: , game asset, clean edges, no text, no watermark, no blank areas, fill the entire image, no empty space, no white borders
style_anchor.prop_suffix: , game asset, clean edges, no text, no watermark, no white borders, 1024x1024 pixel image, isolated single object with natural proportions, the object should NOT fill the entire canvas, leave generous empty background space around the object, object should occupy roughly 40-60% of the image area, do NOT stretch or pad the object to fill a square tile
style_anchor.alpha_suffix: , solid flat uniform chromakey green background (#00FF00), the ENTIRE background must be pure bright green with NO variation NO gradients NO shadows, subject must NOT contain any green colors, sharp well-defined edges between subject and green background, NO white outline, NO white border around the subject, edges should blend naturally into the green background
style_anchor.seamless_suffix: , perfectly seamless tileable texture, uniform flat ambient lighting from directly above, NO directional light source, NO shadows on edges, NO bright spots on corners, even brightness distribution across entire tile, all four edges must match when repeated
